tools.name: usage
tools.description: Check how many Rams reviews this workspace has used and has left (rolling 30 days, shared between the GitHub App and MCP). Free to call — does not consume a review.

tools.name: review_files
tools.description: Run a Rams design review over UI files (React, Vue, Svelte, CSS). Returns a 0-100 score (any critical issue caps it at 59), issues with severity, category, file:line, and concrete fixes. Use before committing UI changes to catch accessibility and design problems. TOKEN COST WARNING: reading and send

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "review_files" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: usage, review_files · Private data: review_files · Public sink: review_files · Destructive: review_files.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: usage, review_files · Private data: review_files · Public sink: review_files · Destructive: review_files

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
